"D:\JetBeans\CLion 2020.3.3\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\Ejercicio.dir/objects.a
D:\MinGW\mingw64\bin\ar.exe cr CMakeFiles\Ejercicio.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\Ejercicio.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\MinGW\mingw64\bin\g++.exe -g   -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\Ejercicio.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive  -o Ejercicio.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libEjercicio.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\Ejercicio.dir\linklibs.rsp
